items.title: AuraMart SaaS & POS Dashboard
items.shortDescription: A high-performance SaaS dashboard and POS system designed for multi-outlet retail operations.
items.description: AuraMart is an all-in-one SaaS platform enabling business owners to manage inventory, staff performance, and real-time sales transactions. It features an offline-first POS client, interactive analytics dashboards, and automatic inventory forecasting utilizing historic sales data.

items.title: AutoFlow Marketing Automation Pipeline
items.shortDescription: Industrial-grade lead scraping and automated multi-channel CRM integration pipeline.
items.description: AutoFlow is a powerful background automation suite designed to capture leads across directories, qualify them based on customized criteria, and auto-dispatch personalized WhatsApp templates. It syncs directly with Google Sheets and Discord webhooks for instant notifications.

items.title: Zenith Task Manager (Android Native)
items.shortDescription: A modern, offline-first productivity and task tracking application built for Android.
items.description: Zenith is a highly optimized, clean, and gesture-driven task manager built with native Android principles. It utilizes an encrypted local Room database, supports automatic cloud backups when online, features home screen widgets, and provides granular productivity analytics.

items.title: CryptoPulse Multi-DEX Arbitrage Bot
items.shortDescription: Real-time scraper tracking cryptocurrency price discrepancies across multiple decentralized exchanges.
items.description: CryptoPulse scans liquidity pools on various decentralized exchanges in real-time. By utilizing low-latency web sockets, it computes price differences for selected tokens and instantly dispatches high-priority Telegram alerts to subscribers when profitable arbitrage opportunities exceed target percentages.

items.title: Quantum Landing Page Builder
items.shortDescription: Ultra-fast, high-converting drag-and-drop landing page builder optimized for mobile sales.
items.description: Quantum is a lightweight web builder focusing on pure loading speed and accessibility. Built to empower marketers to spin up high-converting product landing pages in minutes, featuring pre-designed responsive blocks, custom CSS exports, and embedded payment gateways.
